description: CompositionBlack jacket made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed mock neck with twill tape deatiling on the inseam, full sleeves with ribbed cuffs, full front zipper closure, pockets at the waist, ribbed hem and a grey patch on the chest with branding in applique and embroideryFittingSlimWash careHand wash separately inside outDo not dry clean or bleachDry flat on reverse in shadeIron on reverseEnjoy the winter chill in ease by layering this cotton jacket over your jeans and tees. The ribbed hem, cuffs and neck are sure to keep the winter chill away, while the fabric offers exemplary warm comfort. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight: 5'11"; Shoulders: 17.5"
